title: Tool-call logging via stderr
userStory: As an operator, I want every tool call logged to stderr so that 'docker logs pwa' is the Phase 2 observability story.
acceptanceCriteria: New file pwa/src/lib/server/tools/instrument.ts exports instrument<I, O>(tool) that logs to stderr at start and end of each handler call
End log line: '[tool] <name> done ms=<int> status=<ok|error>' (and on error includes the error message)
Every tool registration is wrapped with instrument(...)
No persistent store — stderr only. Persistent observability + /admin live in Phase 4
Verify: a chat turn that calls 3 tools produces 6 stderr lines (3 start + 3 done) visible via 'docker logs pwa'
